approvalNote: Peter requested a faster app recall line with fewer gaps: 'Here are your search results...' The final phone-speaker/tinny placement is handled in the Reaper rough assembly.

lily_fast_phone_app.role: Fast, quiet, slightly tinny phone assistant voice

takes.speaker: app_voice
takes.text: [fast, crisp, quiet phone speaker, slightly tinny, minimal pauses, neutral assistant voice] Here are your search results: kitchen sink washer replaced, isolation valve stiff, Charlie the dog bites ankles.
